task: 4. Auto-generate narration based on defined accounting scenarios, including 1 Purchase scenario and 6 JV(api) scenarios in the system
description:
Scenario 1  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice TDS Payable By: FEC Clearing Pvt. Ltd.  PURCHASE - T1   BEING BOOKING OF PURCHASE(T1) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   FEC Clearing Pvt. Ltd.  (will be fixed as FEC Clearing, cannot select another org.)        

                       

    Is Invoice with GST?    Yes OR No   If GST is Yes, then all GST columns will be enabled        

            If GST is No, then all GST columns will be disabled        

            If For Purpose head is TRANSPORTATION,         
            then Is RCM? Enabled    Yes or No to be selected       

                       

    TDS Exempted    Yes TDS Payable By: NA - will be disabled / and also TDS% and TDS values       

            (will be disabled and show value as 'NA')          

                       

Scenario 2  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice         JV - T1 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T1) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)              

    Is Statutory Payment?   No             

    Is Invoice with GST?    Yes            

    TDS Payable By: FEC Clearing Pvt. Ltd.             

                       

Scenario 3  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice -       JV - T2 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T2) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)              

    Is Statutory Payment?   No             

    Is Invoice with GST?    Yes            

    TDS Payable By: Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)              

                       

Scenario 4  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice TDS Payable By: NA - will be disabled / and also TDS% and TDS values    JV - T3 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T3) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)   (will be disabled and show value as 'NA')          

    Is Statutory Payment?   No             

    Is Invoice with GST?    Yes            
    TDS Exempted    Yes            

                       

                       

Scenario 5  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice TDS Exempted    fixed as Yes    JV - T4 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T4) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)   TDS Payable By: NA - will be disabled / and also TDS% and TDS values       

    Is Statutory Payment?   Yes (will be disabled and show value as 'NA' - as Beneficiary is Government Authority)         

    Is Invoice with GST?    Yes OR No   If GST is Yes, then all GST columns will be enabled        

            If GST is No, then all GST columns will be disabled        

                       

Scenario 6  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice GST = No, so all GST columns will be disabled       JV - T5 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T5) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)   If For Purpose head is TRANSPORTATION,      with or without RCM

    Is Statutory Payment?   No  Then Is RCM? Field will get enabled        

    Is Invoice with GST?    No  Is RCM? Yes or No to be selected       

    TDS Payable By: FEC Clearing Pvt. Ltd.             

            For all other For Purpose head, Is RCM? Will be disabled           

                       

Scenario 7  Is Invoice / Voucher?   Invoice GST = No, so all GST columns will be disabled       JV - T6 BEING BOOKING OF JV(T6) INV NO.: ABC1234 DATED: 17.11.2025 OF TP VENDOR BENEFICIARY NAME COMPANY PVT. LTD. FOR SHIPPING LINE DETENTION CHARGES OF JOB: IMP/01234/SEA/25-26 AT ACTUAL AS PURE AGENT O/B OF CLIENT: IMPORTER ALIAS, PR BY: KEDAR BHOSALE

    Invoice in favour of:   Other than FEC (Client/Importer/Exporter)   If For Purpose head is TRANSPORTATION,      with or without RCM

    Is Statutory Payment?   No  Then Is RCM? Field will get enabled        
    Is Invoice with GST?    No  Is RCM? Yes or No to be selected

task: 1. The finance team reviews, approves, or reject submitted PR-BR requests through a centralized and controlled workflow.The request, including beneficiary details, job references, approval history, and current status are visible
description: The PR Verification & Booking page allows finance users to review, verify, and complete the booking process for approved PR-BR requests through a structured workflow. The page includes advanced search and filter options, quick view access, and Excel download functionality for efficient tracking and reporting.

task: 2. Functionality of advanced search and filter options such as job number, beneficiary name, invoice number, purpose, issuer, approver, cost centre, and CRM to locate the request. The system also clearly displays who approved, who rejected, current status, and approval timelines, including approval pending days for better tracking and follow-ups.

task: 3. Functionality to Approve, Reject, Delete PR-BR, and download data using the Excel export option. The page also includes actionable dashboards for pending JV and Purchase approvals, approval history tracking, and date-wise search controls
description: Finance users can take direct actions from this screen, including Approve, Reject, Delete PR-BR, and download data using the Excel export option. The page also includes actionable dashboards for pending JV and Purchase approvals, approval history tracking, and date-wise search controls—ensuring transparency, accountability, and efficient approval management   WHEN CHECK BOX CHED THEN  APPROVED MUTIPLE ALSO AND REJHECT ALSO

task: 1.  Finance users can review, verify, and complete the booking process for approved PR-BR requests through a structured workflow. The page also includes advanced search and filter options, quick view access, and Excel download functionality.
description: Once verified, users can proceed with booking actions including Submit PR to Payment. If API integration is unavailable, the system supports manual processing, allowing users to upload voucher numbers and complete booking directly from this page

task: 2. Users can open PR-BR records using the Verify option, which displays the uploaded PR-BR PDFs for detailed review. After checking documents, users can mark the request as Verified or raise a Discrepancy if any mismatch is found
description: Users can open PR-BR records using the Verify option, which displays the uploaded PR-BR PDFs for detailed review. After checking documents, users can mark the request as Verified or raise a Discrepancy if any mismatch is found—ensuring accuracy and compliance before booking

task: 1. This module allows finance users to record and manage payment updates for booked PR-BR transactions. Users can process payments using multiple options including Full Payment, Net Payment, Only GST, or Partial Payment, depending on the transaction requirement.
description: USER CAN UPDATE MULTI PAYMENT ALSO THERE ALSO HAVE PREVISION FOR DOWNLOAD

task: 2. The Generate ENET Files functionality allows finance users to create bank-ready payment files directly from approved and booked PR-BR transactions. The system generates ENET files in a structured bank format using a predefined series-wise reference pattern (e.g., PR260307-001), ensuring consistency and traceability for every payment batch.
description: before enet file user can generate lot numbers also

task: 3. With automated series generation, structured formatting, and seamless bank integration, the ENET feature ensures fast, accurate, and efficient payment execution.
description: Users can generate ENET files for single or multiple PRs from the payment lot. Once generated, the file can be uploaded directly to the bank portal for payment processing.

task: BTBT JOB CREATRE AND UPDATE LISTIING
description: This module provides a centralized interface to create, manage, and update all BTBT jobs. It allows users to view detailed job listings, track status, edit job information, and ensure smooth operational control. Advanced filtering, search options, and real-time updates help in efficiently handling large volumes of orders.

task: BTBT JOB CREATRE AND UPDATE FORM
description: This feature enables users to manually create BTBT jobs through a structured form interface. It ensures accurate data entry with validation checks, allowing users to input all required job details such as location, client information, delivery specifics, and job parameters.

task: BTBT JOB UPLOAD IN HUGE AMOUT
description: Designed for high-volume operations, this module allows users to upload multiple BTBT jobs in bulk using file formats like Excel/CSV. It significantly reduces manual effort and speeds up job creation while ensuring data consistency through predefined templates and validation mechanisms.

task: STORED LOGS AND HISTORY FOR BTBT JOBS
description: This module maintains a complete history of all bulk uploads. It provides detailed logs including upload status, success/failure records, error reports, and timestamps. Users can review and reprocess failed entries, ensuring transparency and control over bulk operations.

task: GATE SHORT AND QUICK  INFORMATION USING SIDE PANEL
description: A dynamic side-panel interface that displays live job updates in real-time. It provides quick insights into job progress, status changes, and key information, enabling faster decision-making and improved client communication without navigating away from the main screen.

task: RELATED TO BTBT JOBS FOR DELIVERY
description: This module handles all delivery-related operations linked to BTBT jobs. It allows assignment of deliveries, tracking of delivery status, updating dispatch details, and ensuring timely execution of jobs with full visibility across the delivery lifecycle.

A dedicated module for managing delivery vehicles. It includes vehicle registration, allocation to jobs, tracking usage, and maintaining vehicle-related records. This ensures optimized utilization of resources and efficient delivery planning.

The RWC Panel serves as a comprehensive reporting and monitoring system. It provides detailed reports, job listings, performance analytics, and statements. This module helps management gain insights into operations and supports data-driven decision-making.

An automated reporting system that generates and sends reports via email at scheduled intervals. Users can configure report types, recipients, and timing, ensuring stakeholders receive timely updates without manual intervention.
